title: Applicability
doc_html:
§3272. Applicability

            This Chapter applies to any housing provider that utilizes third-party billing to manage utility billing for a residential unit with an individual meter and is offered for lease or rent.

            Acts 2024, No. 577, §1.
doc_text:
§3272.  Applicability
This Chapter applies to any housing provider that utilizes third-party billing to
manage utility billing for a residential unit with an individual meter and is offered for lease
or rent.
Acts 2024, No. 577, §1.
